quick_skim.title: Image-Conditioned Instance Prompt Network for Referring Remote Sensing Image Segmentation
quick_skim.abstract: Referring Remote Sensing Image Segmentation (RRSIS) is a situated, task-driven cross-modal task related to the embodied perception paradigm, requiring models to align visual-spatial features with linguistic intentions for precise target perception. Recent research has focused on refining the granularity of textual features and optimizing image-text feature fusion to better guide target feature representations. However, insufficient descriptive granularity and sensitivity to semantic shifts can cause bottlenecks in cross-modal feature fusion. To address these issues, we propose the Image-Conditioned Instance Prompt Network (ICIPNet) with Bilateral Information Fusion, which is designed to alleviate bottlenecks in cross-modal feature fusion. ICIPNet introduces an Image-Conditioned Instance Prompt (ICIP) module to generate self-adaptive visual and semantic representations without external knowledge. The Bilateral Information Fusion (BIF) module enhances feature fusion along the token and channel dimensions. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed ICIPNet outperforms existing RRSIS models.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Cross-modal feature fusion for referring remote sensing image segmentation
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 遥感图像指代分割中的跨模态特征融合
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 遥感图像指代分割中的跨模态特征融合
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 遥感图像指代分割中的跨模态特征融合
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: ICIPNet uses bilateral information fusion with image-conditioned instance prompts to improve cross-modal feature fusion in referring remote sensing image segmentation.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该文提出图像条件实例提示网络（ICIPNet），通过双边信息融合缓解遥感指代分割中跨模态特征融合的瓶颈。方法利用图像条件增强文本特征，并设计双分支融合结构，在多个数据集上分割精度提升显著。为遥感图像的多模态语义分割提供了有效方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该文提出图像条件实例提示网络（ICIPNet），通过双边信息融合缓解遥感指代分割中跨模态特征融合的瓶颈。方法利用图像条件增强文本特征，并设计双分支融合结构，在多个数据集上分割精度提升显著。为遥感图像的多模态语义分割提供了有效方案。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: methods for fusing multimodal remote sensing data from different sensors

quick_skim.title: Towards Unified Vision-Language Models with Incomplete Multi-Modal Inputs
quick_skim.abstract: Video-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated impressive multi-modal reasoning capabilities across diverse computer vision applications. However, these VLMs are task-specific and assume that both video and language inputs are complete. However, real-world VLM applications might face challenges due to deactivated sensors (e.g., cameras are unavailable due to data privacy), yielding modality-incomplete data and leading to inconsistency between training and testing data. While straightforward incomplete input can boast training generalization-ability and lead to training failure, its potential risks to VLMs regarding safety and trustworthiness have been largely neglected. To this end, we make the first attempt to propose a unified incomplete video-language model to process the incomplete multi-modal inputs. Extensive experimental results show that our method can serve as a plug-and-play module for previous works to improve their performance in various multi-modal tasks.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Unified framework for incomplete multi-modal inputs in video-language models
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 视频语言模型中不完整多模态输入的统一框架
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 视频语言模型中不完整多模态输入的统一框架
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 视频语言模型中不完整多模态输入的统一框架
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: First unified incomplete video-language model to handle modality-incomplete inputs via modality-agnostic representations and cross-modal alignment, improving robustness under missing modalities.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该文首次提出统一的不完整视频语言模型框架，处理传感器缺失导致的模态不完整问题。通过设计模态无关的表示学习和跨模态对齐策略，实现任意模态缺失下的鲁棒推理。实验证明其有效性，并揭示了缺失模态对安全性和可信性的影响。该工作为缺失模态学习提供了新视角，可推广到遥感等多模态领域。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该文首次提出统一的不完整视频语言模型框架，处理传感器缺失导致的模态不完整问题。通过设计模态无关的表示学习和跨模态对齐策略，实现任意模态缺失下的鲁棒推理。实验证明其有效性，并揭示了缺失模态对安全性和可信性的影响。该工作为缺失模态学习提供了新视角，可推广到遥感等多模态领域。
